title: phyllanthus paxianus
intro: Phyllanthus paxianus, also known as the Chinese swamp cabbage, is a type of plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus paxianus include reducing liver inflammation, protecting against liver damage, and alleviating symptoms of fever and cough. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus paxianus include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
